channel.title: Field Notes: Open Membership example feed
channel.description: A non-functional example feed shaped for the Open Membership 0.4 namespace. The publisher domain is fictional; the protocol surface is real.

item.title: Open episode: how the warehouse fire was investigated
item.description: A recap of the public investigation into the warehouse fire: the bits that ran in the daily papers, plus the timeline.

item.title: Members-only: the report the city did not want released
item.description: The fire investigators' report was filed two weeks before the building permit was approved.
item.om:preview: The fire investigators' report was filed two weeks before the building permit was approved. What follows is the report, the email chain that buried it, and the council vote that mattered.
